scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the default OutputSettings instance after Document construction
scenarios.expectedResult: returned instance is the same as doc.outputSettings() field initialized by constructor

scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the updated OutputSettings instance after setting a new one via setter
scenarios.precondition:
Document doc = new Document("http://example.com");
Document.OutputSettings custom = new Document.OutputSettings().prettyPrint(false);
scenarios.expectedResult: returned instance is the same as the custom OutputSettings passed to setOutputSettings
